summary: Excellent Charlie Miller soundboard transfer capturing one of the fan‑favorite SF Orpheum shows.
review: The Miller transfer is praised as sounding great, indicating a clean and well‑balanced soundboard source. The reviewer cites the July 1976 Orpheum run as a personal favorite, suggesting the performance itself is highly regarded even though no specific songs are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderately detailed review; it rates the show 4/5 and compliments the transfer, leading to an overall four‑star assessment but limited confidence due to a single data point.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Charlie Miller's transfer described as sounding great – clear, well‑balanced and free of noticeable issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer calls the Orpheum run a favorite, implying overall strong performance and set flow, though no specific details are given.
